message:
refactor: Apply clippy lints and test improvements

lib.rs:
- Add cfg_attr to allow large_stack_arrays in tests only, preventing
  clippy warnings about stack-allocated test fixtures

test_utils.rs:
- Minor formatting improvement

time/sleep.rs:
- Add documentation

transport/tests.rs:
- Restructure test assertions for clarity
- Improve variable naming

types/cancel.rs:
- Simplify cancellation reason handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
